caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall and clothing racks in the background. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. In the bottom corners of the scene, logos are visible: one on the left reads "THE ROOM" and one on the right reads "RED VELVET PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man looks toward someone off-screen to his left. He begins with a neutral expression, then slightly purses his lips, and eventually breaks into a smile, showing his teeth. The background, featuring a white mannequin and various pieces of apparel, remains static as the man's facial expression shifts from serious to amused.
